text: "Oden" is one of the traditional foods besides Sushi and Ramen that Japanese people eat often.
"Oden" is a Japanese traditional street food.
Families surrounding the pot of oden, workers eating oden after work, you can tell this food is widely loved in Japan.
Oden is a very tasty and gentle dish.
When you come to Japan, I highly recommend you eating oden.
When people go to an oden restaurant, they order 'Hoppy' as well.
